hindiTranslation: देहधारी विवेकी मनुष्य देहको उत्पन्न करनेवाले इन तीनों गुणोंका अतिक्रमण करके जन्म, मृत्यु और वृद्धावस्थारूप दुःखोंसे रहित हुआ अमरताका अनुभव करता है ॥
englishTranslation: The embodied one who rises beyond these three qualities, which arise from the body, is freed from birth, death, old age, and sorrow, and attains immortality.
essence: Freedom begins when the three qualities no longer define you.
speaker: Krishna
